name: Mira
text: Moon, my sister Aisha and I built this Grand Illusion together. No solitary wagers.

name: Aisha
text: My sister rigs chance. I work sorcery. Defeat us apart, and we still finish together.

name: Moon
text: Then ask together. Sunset will not abandon the girl ahead of me.

name: Mira
text: Still calling pursuit devotion? I will expose that bluff before my sister casts the finale.

name: Aisha
text: And I will trust my sister's read. Wishbound will test what remains after the trick.

name: Moon
text: I am done hiding behind noble words. Come at me—both of you.
